title: First Unique Character in a String
description: Return the index of the first character in `s` that appears exactly once. If no character is unique, return `-1`. The index is zero-based.

parameters.name: s
parameters.description: String in which you need to find the first non-repeated character.

returns.description: The index of the first unique character, or `-1` if none exists.

examples.title: Example 1
examples.explanation: `l` is the first character that appears exactly once.

examples.title: Example 3
examples.explanation: Every character appears at least twice.
